meaning: adj.斯宾塞哲学的,斯宾塞哲学体系的
examples: But Norton was no Spencerian, and he, too, strove for Martin's philosophic soul, talking as much at him as to his two opponents.
After Spencerian received a civil investigative demand from the Office of the Attorney General, it removed the conflicting graduation placement rates from its website.
My emails to Spencerian directors were not answered.
